title: cephalanthera damasonium f. collina
intro: Cephalanthera damasonium f. collina, also known as the lesser helleborine, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The lesser helleborine is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its usage and availability are often limited due to its rarity and regulatory status.
